name: The Discovery
effect: Declare a discovery phase complete. This card is considered thorough.

clauses.name: DISCOVERY CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If a discovery phase is announced: It is considered to have occurred.

clauses.name: ASSUMPTIONS OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If no stakeholders were interviewed: Assumptions from the previous project are considered findings.

clauses.name: FORGETFULNESS CLAUSE
clauses.rule: Next turn: No one asks what was discovered.
